title: elymus pendulinus subsp. multiculmis
intro: Elymus pendulinus subsp. multiculmis, also known as the multiculmis wheatgrass, is a subspecies of grass native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus pendulinus subsp. multiculmis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms.
